examples: Phytotoxin, one of the most important factors of fungal disease which is the major plant disease, is paid much attention to.
Those above results indicated that pine wood nematode promoted the production of phytotoxin by bacterium in the host tissue.
Results also showed that pine wood nematode itself neither produced phytotoxin nor affected the toxicity of extracts from the culture of bacterium after the addition of it.
